prompt: Using the compliant model, I need Year 3 EBITDA to be at least $3,500,000. What does the Year 1 revenue need to be to hit that target? Find the exact input value.
assertions: Reports a specific Inp_Rev_Y1 value (approximately $11.2M) that produces EBITDA_Y3 within 1% of $3,500,000
Shows an iteration log or convergence path demonstrating the write-recalculate-read pattern
The final xlsx reflects the solved state (not reverted to $10M)
Reports the full model output at the solved state (Revenue, COGS, GP, OpEx, EBITDA for all years)
The required revenue increase is framed in actionable business terms
All arithmetic was delegated to the spreadsheet engine
